arts.ttl: Carlisle United boss on Grimsby test and bid for 'momentum'
arts.sum: Mike Williamson says Carlisle United will need to focus until the very final kick against a Grimsby Town side with a range of threats.

arts.ttl: AFC Wimbledon managing director James Woodroof hoping Plough Lane can host Carlisle United clash
arts.sum: The Dons hope to be able to host Carlisle United on October 12 despite the stadium and pitch being damaged after heavy rainfall caused the banks of the River Wandle to burst on Sunday night. AFC Wimbledon’s managing director James Woodroof has described the donations to help repair their Plough Lane pitch as “absolutely phenomenal”.

arts.ttl: Williamson: What I've learned in my first week in charge at Carlisle United
arts.sum: New head coach Mike Williamson has spelled out what he has learned from his first week in charge at Carlisle United.

arts.ttl: Carlisle United chiefs to update on sporting director search
arts.sum: Carlisle United’s hierarchy were today set to brief head coach Mike Williamson on the search for a sporting director.
